title: Whats that bird? A 2 Day Bird Spotting Workshop

title: Movie Screening - Dug Dug
caption_full:
The AIFF Show is back this Friday, 3rd July, 5 PM, at Science Park Auditorium, and this oneГўв‚¬в„ўs big.
WeГўв‚¬в„ўre hosting Ritwik Pareek, director, Prerna Pareek, producer and the entire team of Dug Dug . A film about a motorcycle shrine and a Rajasthani roadside legend that went all the way to the Toronto International Film Festival, and now itГўв‚¬в„ўs coming back home to Jaipur where the story actually began.
Catch the screening, hear the team talk about how a local legend turned into a film that travelled the world.
3rd July | 5 PM | Science Park Auditorium
See you there. #filmfestival #jaipur #filmscreening #dugdug #aiff @ritwikpareek @anuragkashyap10 @motwayne @nikkhiladvani @vasanbala @cinemakasam @papihah @balabijith @actoryogendra9 @gauravsoni @salvageaudiocollective @rhnr @thejjsticks @viraajsaxena @studirt @theprodro @mainhoonromy @andreas_brueckl_colorist @ankurtewari @doobsey @rhitz_xcurve_audio @filmyaroon @raghuveersinghrathore1 @nothing.shekhar @verma_kshitij @neejudge @rajendraakula @filmynerd @mulberry_media @ohflipfilms @dugdugthefilm @ranjit1979 @prernakathuria @filmyaroon @yashikaroutray @suryadevpareek".

title: Weekend Movie Screenings by Jaipur Center For Arts
venue: Jaipur Center for Arts, City Palace
caption_full:
186 likes, 4 comments - jaipurcentreforart on June 29, 2026: "Г°ЕёЕЅВ¬ The wait is over! WeГўв‚¬в„ўre happy to share the opening weekend schedule for our Summer Film Programme: ArtistsГўв‚¬в„ў Cinema / ArtistГўв‚¬в„ўs Cinema, Curated by Shwetal A. Patel @shwetalashvinpatel 

Starting this Friday, 3 July, at Jaipur Centre for Art, City Palace, Jaipur, the programme brings together a wide range of films from India and around the world.

Running from 3 July to 9 August, the programme features 150+ films, including artistsГўв‚¬в„ў films, independent cinema, restored classics, animation, and student films.

Г°ЕёвЂњВЅГЇВёВЏ Daily screenings from 2:00 PM, with the last screening ending around 8:00 PM. 

Whether youГўв‚¬в„ўre a film lover, student, artist, or simply curious to discover something new, we hope youГўв‚¬в„ўll join us.

title: Antra - An Open Mic Experience by SocialSpot Exp
Heritage Walk at Jaigarh Cannon Foundry
caption_full:
"Jaigarh's Cannon Foundry stands as a testament to the ingenuity and technical expertise that made the fort one of the region's foremost centres of artillery production.

Join us for a guided Cannon Foundry Walkthrough with Ram Krishna Sharma and discover the stories behind this extraordinary space, its remarkable technology, and its enduring place in Jaigarh's legacy.

Where: Jaigarh (Meeting Point: Outside Cannon Foundry | Parking: Tanka Chowk)
When: Saturday, 4 July 2026
Time: 8:30 AM вЂ“ 10:00 AM

Registration: Register through the link in our bio.".

title: UDBHAV 2026 an Painting Exhibit at JKK
venue: Surekh Art Gallery, Jawahar Kala Kendra (JKK), Jaipur
caption_full:
UDBHAV 2026 is a celebration of artistic expression, where every canvas tells a unique story.

Join us for a two-day exhibition showcasing original works by emerging artists from the Certificate Programme in Painting at the Indian Institute of Crafts & Design.
